---
name: Bug Report
about: Something in a contract, script, or CI is broken or behaving incorrectly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

What's broken, in one or two sentences.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened, including error messages or transaction hashes if applicable.

## Environment

- Network: testnet / local
- Contract: tholos / demo-consumer
- Commit or tag: 

## Possible impact

If this affects fund safety or contract state integrity, say so explicitly. See
[SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md) instead of this template if you believe this is a
security vulnerability rather than a functional bug.
